violations.text: Observed self-service foods lacking label/ingredient list. Self-service foods items in an establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a food safety manager that is registered/licensed by the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Application was left with the PIC at the time of inspection. Application to be submitted as soon as possible. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Food items set for self selection and items packaged in the establishment were observed to be lacking labels and/or food item ingredient/allergen information visible to the customer. Per the PIC, information is kept behind the counter on a clipboard. Individual food items set for self selection are to have the list of ingredients/allergens readily available for customer viewing, and food items packaged in the facility must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients/allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
